title: Jump Tradiny
author: IndividualString9970
selftext:
How Jump Tradiny works

a Cos Alternative that alot of us have come to Love due to its reward system, for anyone not aware of this platform i will give you a run down here of how it works...  


***Link***
https://jumptd1.top/#/register?code=CMAVDB

**Step 1** ... First off as you will notice you will be rewarded with a 200USDT bonus on registration, tis bonus is only a boost for 24 hours and will disappear after that time limit, it is recommended to deposit before you start to quantify to maximise how much you earn from it, Next step will explain the deposit process...  


**Step 2** ... Deposit/Recharge all transactions are done on the Tron blockchain TRC-20 meaning an exchange is recommended for sending funds, KRAKEN i recommend personally, once you have all this in place 50 USDT is minimum to qualify for VIP 1 but needs to be manually activated by clicking on the VIP 1 badge and staking your 50USDT for 25days, unlocking 4 quantifies a day and increasing earn limit...  


**Step 3** ... Team Inviting this step will help you maximise your earning, for each VIP level there is a required amount of level 1 subordinates which will be stated on level info, you will also gain daily commission for all all members you invite meaning it is worth while getting as many members as you can, they will also need to activate VIP 1 to qualify as your team member so make sure to teach them well..  


Additional Rewards ... Sign in bonus is a little added extra clicking sign in button once a day give you that little added bonus, but also there is a wheel spin, you earn one spin for even level 1 subordinate that activates VIP 1, these bonuses are 24 hr boosts just like the start up bonus so use them wisely.  


***Link***
https://jumptd1.top/#/register?code=CMAVDB

Any Questions or issues feel free to post them here as we all here for one thing to make money ....
